perks.summary: crash-exod drill (P2-T10) — exod dies mid-step: orphan sandbox reaped, step records error (no false pass), run resumable
all V-CHAOS drills (P2-T10) — partition (next refuses closed + idempotent resume) + crash-exod (orphan reaped, error recorded, resumable) + settle-crash atomicity
partition drill (P2-T10) — govd<->exod partition: running step completes, next refuses closed, WS resume idempotent (zero dup)
settle-engine crash atomicity (P6-T17) — crash mid-posting-set is all-or-nothing, replays exactly once, conservation holds through the crash
